response: Headquartered in Austin, Texas, Acme Corp employs 342 people and generated $54.4 million in total annual revenue, marking an 18% year-over-year increase. This full-year performance was driven by quarterly revenues of $12.3 million in Q1, $14.1 million in Q2, $11.8 million in Q3, and $16.2 million in Q4.
